article_title: Fecal Transplant Capsules Nearly Double Immunotherapy Response Rates Across Three Cancer Types in Phase I/II Trials

content_preview.title: Fecal Transplant Capsules Nearly Double Immunotherapy Response Rates Across Three Cancer Types in Phase I/II Trials
content_preview.summary: Two companion trials published in Nature Medicine show oral FMT capsules raised immunotherapy response rates to 80% in lung cancer and 75% in melanoma, while reducing toxic side effects in kidney cancer.
content_preview.body_excerpt:
## Overview

Two companion clinical trials published in [Nature Medicine](https://www.nature.com/articles/s41591-025-04186-5) in January 2026 report that oral fecal microbiota transplant (FMT) capsules, when combined with immune checkpoint inhibitors, produced markedly higher response rates in patients with lung cancer, melanoma, and kidney cancer than immunotherapy alone typically achieves. The studies — PERFORM (Phase I) and FMT-LUMINate (Phase II) — used the same standardized capsule product,...
